name: Georgi Naydenov
title: Senior AI Business Analyst at SoftServe
subtitle: Portfolio & Knowledge Library
bio: Welcome to my professional portfolio. Here, you will find various things I have created throughout my journey.

categoryDescriptions.artifacts: A diverse collection including AI Prototypes (Claude & NotebookLM), Study Guides (TOGAF®, CBAP®, Scrum.org), and technical Proof of Concepts.
categoryDescriptions.articles: In-depth publications exploring AI strategy, addressing organizational dysfunctions, and providing frameworks for digital transformation.
categoryDescriptions.posts: Curated thoughts and updates on AI ethics, handling LLM hallucinations, and making sense of news in the AI world.
categoryDescriptions.appearances: Check out my videos and interviews.

meta.ogDescription: AI Prototypes, Study Guides, Articles, and Public Appearances from a Senior AI Business Analyst.
